channel.title: Soups on Bell Favorite Recipes
channel.description: Recent content in Soups on Bell Favorite Recipes

item.title: Judy’s Miracle Soup
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 5 cups water
  • 2 28-oz tins tomatoes
  • 2 green peppers, diced
  • 1 medium cabbage, shredded
  • 1 large onion, finely chopped
  • 1 stalk celery, diced
  • 1 35-gram pkg onion soup mix

Instructions

In large pot, combine water, tomatoes, peppers, cabbage, onion, celery and onion soup mix. Bring to boil, reduce heat and simmer 45 minutes, adding more water if desired. Makes about 24 cups.

item.title: Lena Langevin Creamy Potato Soup
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 3 medium potatoes, peeled and cubed
  • 2 Tbsp butter
  • 1 small onion, chopped
  • 2 Tbsp flour
  • 1 cup milk
  • Celery salt and garlic to taste (optional)
  • 2 slices processed cheese

Instructions

Boil potatoes with seasonings in enough water to cover, until cooked. Mash potatoes with their cooking water. They should be slightly liquefied. In small saucepan, melt butter. Add flour to form a smooth paste. Stir butter mixture into mashed potatoes. Over low heat, gradually stir milk into potato mixture. Add cheese; stir until melted. Makes 3 to 4 servings.

item.title: Main Course Cabbage Soup
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb ground beef
  • 1 – 28 oz can tomatoes
  • 1 medium onion
  • 2 – 5-1/2 oz cans tomato paste
  • ½ cup diced celery
  • 6 cups hot water
  • ½ green pepper, chopped
  • 2 beef or chicken bouillon cubes
  • 2 tbsp oil
  • 3 tbsp chopped parsley
  • 2 tsp salt
  • 2 cups raw potatoes, diced
  • 2 tbsp sugar
  • 1 cup raw carrot, diced
  • 1/8 tsp pepper
  • ¼ tsp baking soda
  • 6 cups cabbage, coarsely chopped

Instructions

In a very large soup pot, sauté ground beef, onion, celery and green pepper in the oil until redness is gone from meat. Break meat up as it sautés. Add remaining ingredients, except cabbage, and combine thoroughly. Simmer uncovered for 1 hr, stirring occasionally. Add cabbage and simmer covered, for 1 hr. longer. If soup is too thick, more water may be added.

item.title: Quick Vegetable Soup
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 quart chicken broth or stock
  • 1 16-oz can tomatoes
  • ½ cup chopped onion
  • ½ cup chopped cabbage
  • 1 10-oz pkg frozen mixed veggies,
  • ½ tsp dried basil
  • thawed
  • 1/8 tsp pepper
  • Dash sugar
  • ¼ cup uncooked elbow macaroni
  • 1 cup leftover cubed cooked chicken
  • or roast beef

Instructions

In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, bring broth, tomatoes, onion, cabbage, vegetables and seasonings to a boil. Add macaroni and simmer 10 minutes or until tender. Add meat and heat through.

item.title: Roly’s Barley Soup
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 lbs soup bones
  • 8 cups water (to start with)
  • 1 cup barley
  • ¾ tsp savory
  • 3 large carrots, diced
  • Pinch garlic salt
  • 3 medium onions, diced
  • ½ tsp oregano
  • 4 stalks celery with leaves, diced
  • 28-oz tin stewed tomatoes
  • 2 tsp parsley
  • Salt & Pepper to taste

Instructions

Boil water and bones for about ½ hour. Add barley and spices; let boil for about 1 hour. Add more water, if needed. Add vegetables and tomatoes; let cook until vegetables are ready. Sit and enjoy.

item.title: Vegetable Burger Soup
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1 lb ground beef
  • ½ cup dry onion soup mix
  • 1 can stewed tomatoes
  • 1 tsp white sugar
  • 8-oz can tomato sauce
  • 1 cup diced potatoes
  • 2 cups water
  • 1 tbsp celery salt
  • 10-oz pkg frozen mixed vegetables

Instructions

In Dutch oven or large pan, brown ground beef. Drain off fat. Stir in tomatoes, tomato sauce, water, onion soup mix, vegetables, sugar and celery salt. Bring to boil; reduce heat, cover and simmer ½ hour. Add diced potatoes; simmer 20 minutes longer.
